records.chapter: Punishment of not reciting Surah Tauheed for three days
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1.  It is narrated that Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.) said, “If three days  of  a  person’s  life  pass  by  without  reciting  Surah Tauheed,  he  is  without  a  companion.  Faith  will  be  taken away from him and if that person dies after these three days, he will die as a disbeliever of Allah, the Greatest.”
records.arabicText: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ خَالِدٍ عَنْ إِسْمَاعِیلَ بْنِ مِهْرَانَ عَنِ الْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ عَلِیٍّ الْبَطَائِنِیِّ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ الْمُؤْمِنِ عَنِ ابْنِ مُسْکَانَ عَنْ سُلَیْمَانَ بْنِ خَالِدٍ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع یَقُولُ مَنْ مَضَتْ لَهُ ثَلَاثَهُ أَیَّامٍ لَمْ یَقْرَأْ فِیهَا قُلْ هُوَ اللَّهُ أَحَدٌ فَقَدْ خُذِلَ وَ نَزَعَ رِبْقَهَ الْإِیمَانِ مِنْ عُنُقِهِ فَإِنْ مَاتَ فِی هَذِهِ الثَّلَاثَهِ أَیَّامٍ کَانَ کَافِراً بِاللَّهِ الْعَظِیمِ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1.  It is narrated that Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.) said,
records.thaqalaynMatn: “If three days  of  a  person’s  life  pass  by  without  reciting  Surah Tauheed,  he  is  without  a  companion.  Faith  will  be  taken away from him and if that person dies after these three days, he will die as a disbeliever of Allah, the Greatest.”

records.chapter: Punishment of not reciting Surah Tauheed on Friday
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1.  It is narrated that Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.) said, “One who dies without reciting Surah Ikhlaas on Friday, has died on the religion of Abu Lahab.”
records.arabicText: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ الصَّفَّارُ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ الْبَرْقِیِّ قَالَ فِی رِوَایَهِ إِسْحَاقَ بْنِ عَمَّارٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ سَمِعْتُهُ یَقُولُ مَنْ مَضَتْ لَهُ جُمُعَهٌ لَمْ یَقْرَأْ فِیهَا قُلْ هُوَ اللَّهُ أَحَدٌ ثُمَّ مَاتَ مَاتَ عَلَی دِینِ أَبِی لَهَبٍ.

records.chapter: Punishment of not reciting Surah Ikhlaas during illness and calamity
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1.  It is narrated that Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.) said, “One who is  involved in some  disease  or  calamity  and if he  dies  in such a state without reciting Surah Ikhlaas, he shall go to Hell.”
records.arabicText: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ الصَّفَّارُ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ إِسْمَاعِیلَ بْنِ مِهْرَانَ عَنِ الْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ عَلِیٍّ الْبَطَائِنِیِّ عَنْ صَنْدَلٍ عَنْ هَارُونَ بْنِ خَارِجَهَ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع یَقُولُ مَنْ أَصَابَهُ مَرَضٌ أَوْ شِدَّهٌ وَ لَمْ یَقْرَأْ فِیهَا قُلْ هُوَ اللَّهُ أَحَدٌ ثُمَّ مَاتَ فِی مَرَضِهِ- أَوْ فِی تِلْکَ الشِّدَّهِ الَّتِی نَزَلَتْ بِهِ فَهُوَ فِی النَّارِ.

records.chapter: Punishment of not reciting Surah Ikhlaas in any of the five Prayers of a day
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1.  It is narrated that Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.) said, “One who offers all of the five prayers of a day without reciting Surah Ikhlaas in any of them, will be told: O servant of Allah! You are not of those who pray.”
records.arabicText: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ عَلِیِّ بْنِ سَیْفٍ عَنْ أَخِیهِ الْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ سَیْفِ بْنِ عَمِیرَهَ عَنْ مَنْصُورِ بْنِ حَازِمٍ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع یَقُولُ مَنْ مَضَی بِهِ یَوْمٌ وَاحِدٌ صَلَّی فِیهِ خَمْسِینَ صَلَاهً لَمْ یَقْرَأْ فِیهَا قُلْ هُوَ اللَّهُ أَحَدٌ قِیلَ لَهُ یَا عَبْدَ اللَّهِ لَسْتَ مِنَ الْمُصَلِّینَ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1.  It is narrated that Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.) said,
records.thaqalaynMatn: “One who offers all of the five prayers of a day without reciting Surah Ikhlaas in any of them, will be told: O servant of Allah! You are not of those who pray.”

records.chapter: Punishment of memorizing and again forgetting a chapter of the Holy Quran
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1.  It is narrated that Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.) said, “One who memorizes a Surah of Quran and then forgets it, this Surah will appear on an elevated place on the Day of Judgment with a beautiful look. When the person will look at it, he will ask: Who are you? You are so beautiful that I would have loved to own you. It will reply: Didn’t you recognize me?  I  am  so  and  so  Surah.  If  you  hadn’t  forgotten  me,  I would have elevated you also to this position.”
records.arabicText: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ ابْنِ فَضَّالٍ عَنْ أَبِی الْمَعْزَاءِ عَنْ أَبِی بَصِیرٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ سَمِعْتُهُ یَقُولُ مَنْ نَسِیَ سُورَهً مِنَ الْقُرْآنِ مُثِّلَتْ فِی صُورَهٍ حَسَنَهٍ وَ دَرَجَهٍ رَفِیعَهٍ فَإِذَا رَآهَا قَالَ مَنْ أَنْتِ مَا أَحْسَنَکِ لَیْتَکِ لِی فَتَقُولُ مَا تَعْرِفُنِی أَنَا سُورَهُ کَذَا وَ کَذَا لَوْ لَمْ تَنْسَنِی لَرَفَعْتُکَ إِلَی هَذَا الْمَکَانِ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1.  It is narrated that Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.) said,
records.thaqalaynMatn: “One who memorizes a Surah of Quran and then forgets it, this Surah will appear on an elevated place on the Day of Judgment with a beautiful look. When the person will look at it, he will ask: Who are you? You are so beautiful that I would have loved to own you. It will reply: Didn’t you recognize me?  I  am  so  and  so  Surah.  If  you  hadn’t  forgotten  me,  I would have elevated you also to this position.”

records.chapter: Punishment of insulting a believer
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1.  It  is  narrated  that  Imam  Ja’far  Sadiq  (a.s.)  said  that  the Almighty Allah has said, “He has waged a war against Me that insults My believing servant. And he is safe from My anger that respects My believing servant.”
records.arabicText: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ مُوسَی بْنِ الْمُتَوَکِّلِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ الْحِمْیَرِیُّ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ هِشَامِ بْنِ سَالِمٍ عَنِ الْمُعَلَّی بْنِ خُنَیْسٍ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع یَقُولُ قَالَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَ لِیَأْذَنْ بِحَرْبٍ مِنِّی مَنْ أَذَلَّ عَبْدِیَ الْمُؤْمِنَ وَ لْیَأْمَنْ غَضَبِی مَنْ أَکْرَمَ عَبْدِیَ الْمُؤْمِنَ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1.  It  is  narrated  that  Imam  Ja’far  Sadiq  (a.s.)  said  that  the Almighty Allah has said,
records.thaqalaynMatn: “He has waged a war against Me that insults My believing servant. And he is safe from My anger that respects My believing servant.”

records.chapter: Punishment of forsaking a believer
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Idris from Ahmad b. Muhammad from Ibn Fadhal from Hamad b. Isa from Ibrahim b. Umar al-Yamani from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “Allah will forsake in this world and the hereafter one who forsakes a believer in spite of having the capacity to help him.”
records.arabicText: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ إِدْرِیسَ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ ابْنِ فَضَّالٍ عَنْ حَمَّادِ بْنِ عِیسَی عَنْ إِبْرَاهِیمَ بْنِ عُمَرَ الْیَمَانِیِّ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَا مِنْ مُؤْمِنٍ یَخْذُلُ مُؤْمِناً أَخَاهُ وَ هُوَ یَقْدِرُ عَلَی نُصْرَتِهِ إِلَّا خَذَلَهُ اللَّهُ فِی الدُّنْیَا وَ الْآخِرَهِ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Idris from Ahmad b. Muhammad from Ibn Fadhal from Hamad b. Isa from Ibrahim b. Umar al-Yamani from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: “Allah will forsake in this world and the hereafter one who forsakes a believer in spite of having the capacity to help him.”

records.chapter: Punishment of taunting a believer and turning a deaf ear to his words
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1.  Imam  Ja’far  Sadiq  (a.s.)  said,  “Surely  Allah,  the  Mighty and Sublime has created the believers with the light of His greatness  and  the  majesty  of  His  supremacy.  Hence,  one who taunts him or turns a deaf ear to his words has rejected Allah on His throne. He will not get anything from Allah; he is only a partner of Shaitaan.”
records.arabicText: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَلِیٍّ مَاجِیلَوَیْهِ عَنْ عَمِّهِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِیٍّ الْکُوفِیِّ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ سِنَانٍ عَنِ الْمُفَضَّلِ بْنِ عُمَرَ قَالَ قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع إِنَّ اللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ خَلَقَ الْمُؤْمِنِینَ مِنْ نُورِ عَظَمَتِهِ وَ جَلَالِ کَرَامَتِهِ فَمَنْ طَعَنَ عَلَیْهِمْ أَوْ رَدَّ عَلَیْهِمْ قَوْلَهُمْ فَقَدْ رَدَّ اللَّهَ فِی عَرْشِهِ وَ لَیْسَ مِنَ اللَّهِ فِی شَیْ ءٍ إِنَّمَا هُوَ شِرْکُ الشَّیْطَانِ.

records.chapter: Punishment of taunting and insulting a believer
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1.  Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.) said, “There is no man that taunts or  insults  a  believer  but  that  he  will  die  the  worst  death desiring to return to this world to do good.”
records.arabicText: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ أَبِی الْخَطَّابِ عَنْ حَمَّادِ بْنِ عِیسَی عَنْ رِبْعِیٍّ عَنِ الْفَضْلِ بْنِ یَسَارٍ قَالَ قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع مَا مِنْ إِنْسَانٍ یَطْعُنُ فِی عَیْنِ مُؤْمِنٍ إِلَّا مَاتَ بِشَرِّ مِیتَهٍ وَ کَانَ یَتَمَنَّی أَنْ یَرْجِعَ إِلَی خَیْرٍ.

records.chapter: Punishment of staying away from a believer
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1.  Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.) said, “One who keeps away from a believer, the Almighty Allah will veil Paradise from him with  seventy  thousand  walls,  each  at  a  distance  of  a thousand years from one another.”
records.arabicText: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِیٍّ الْکُوفِیِّ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ سِنَانٍ عَنِ الْمُفَضَّلِ بْنِ عُمَرَ قَالَ قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع أَیُّمَا مُؤْمِنٍ کَانَ بَیْنَهُ وَ بَیْنَ مُؤْمِنٍ حِجَابٌ ضَرَبَ اللَّهُ بَیْنَهُ وَ بَیْنَ الْجَنَّهِ سَبْعِینَ أَلْفَ سُورٍ مَسِیرَهُ أَلْفِ عَامٍ مَا بَیْنَ السُّورِ إِلَی السُّورِ.

records.chapter: Punishment of taking profit from a believer
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1.  Imam  Ja’far  Sadiq  (a.s.)  said,  “A  believer  making  profit from another believer is like one who is taking usury.”
records.arabicText: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ أَبِی الْقَاسِمِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِیٍّ الْکُوفِیِّ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ سِنَانٍ عَنْ فُرَاتِ بْنِ أَحْنَفَ قَالَ قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع رِبْحُ الْمُؤْمِنِ عَلَی الْمُؤْمِنِ رِبًا.

records.chapter: Punishment of giving more importance to a mortgaged thing than a believer
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Sa’d b. Abdillah from Ya’qub b. Yazid from Marwak b. ’Ubayd from some of our companions from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “I hate the person who gives more importance to a mortgaged thing than a Muslim brother.”
records.arabicText: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ یَعْقُوبَ بْنِ یَزِیدَ عَنْ مَرْوَکِ بْنِ عُبَیْدٍ عَنْ بَعْضِ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ کَانَ الرَّهْنُ عِنْدَهُ أَوْثَقَ مِنْ أَخِیهِ الْمُسْلِمِ فَأَنَا مِنْهُ بَرِی ءٌ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Sa’d b. Abdillah from Ya’qub b. Yazid from Marwak b. ’Ubayd from some of our companions from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: “I hate the person who gives more importance to a mortgaged thing than a Muslim brother.”

records.chapter: Punishment of depriving a believer of a thing
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1.  Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.) said, “One who has power over a thing  belonging  to  him  or  to  another  person  which  a believer desires to have and if this person does not allow it to be given to the believer, the Almighty Allah will raise him on the Day of Judgment with a black face, blind and hands tied  to  the  back  of  his  neck.  It  will  be  said:  ‘This  is  that untrustworthy   person   who   distrusted   Allah   and   His Messenger (s.a.w.s.).’ He will be ordered to be taken to the fire (of Hell).”
records.arabicText: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ سِنَانٍ عَنْ فُرَاتِ بْنِ أَحْنَفَ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: أَیُّمَا مُؤْمِنٍ مَنَعَ مُؤْمِناً شَیْئاً مِمَّا یَحْتَاجُ إِلَیْهِ وَ هُوَ یَقْدِرُ عَلَیْهِ أَوْ مِنْ عِنْدِ غَیْرِهِ أَقَامَهُ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ مُسْوَدّاً وَجْهُهُ مُزْرَقَّهً عَیْنَاهُ مَغْلُولَهً یَدَاهُ إِلَی عُنُقِهِ فَیُقَالُ هَذَا الْخَائِنُ الَّذِی خَانَ اللَّهَ وَ رَسُولَهُ ثُمَّ یُؤْمَرُ بِهِ إِلَی النَّارِ.

records.chapter: Punishment of depriving a believer of his right
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1.  Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.) told Yunus, “One who deprives a believer of his right, the Almighty Allah will make him stand on his feet for five hundred years on the Day of Judgment. He will sweat so much the earth will be filled it. A caller will  call  out:  this  is  that  unjust  person  who  deprived  the believer   of   his   right.   He   will   continuously   receive punishment for forty years, then he will be ordered to be taken to the fire (of Hell).”
records.arabicText: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ الصَّفَّارُ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِی الْقَاسِمِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِیٍّ الْکُوفِیِّ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ سِنَانٍ عَنْ یُونُسَ بْنِ ظَبْیَانَ قَالَ قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع یَا یُونُسُ مَنْ حَبَسَ حَقَّ الْمُؤْمِنِ أَقَامَهُ اللَّهُ یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ خَمْسَمِائَهِ عَامٍ عَلَی رِجْلَیْهِ حَتَّی یَسِیلَ مِنْ عَرَقِهِ أَوْدِیَهٌ وَ یُنَادِی مُنَادٍ مِنْ عِنْدِ اللَّهِ هَذَا الظَّالِمُ الَّذِی حَبَسَ عَنِ الْمُؤْمِنِ حَقَّهُ فیولج [فَیُوَبَّخُ] أَرْبَعِینَ یَوْماً ثُمَّ یُؤْمَرُ بِهِ إِلَی النَّارِ.

records.chapter: Punishment of depriving a believer of his right
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 2. And from the previous chain from Muhammad b. Sinan from al-Muffadhal from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “One who withholds the wealth of a believer which he needed, by Allah, he will never taste the food of Paradise nor will he be able to taste the sealed drink of Paradise.”
records.arabicText: وَ بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ سِنَانٍ عَنِ الْمُفَضَّلِ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: أَیُّمَا مُؤْمِنٍ حَبَسَ مُؤْمِناً عَنْ مَالِهِ وَ هُوَ مُحْتَاجٌ إِلَیْهِ لَمْ یَذُقْ وَ اللَّهِ مِنْ طَعَامِ الْجَنَّهِ وَ لَا یَشْرَبُ مِنَ الرَّحِیقِ الْمَخْتُومِ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 2. And from the previous chain from Muhammad b. Sinan from al-Muffadhal from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: “One who withholds the wealth of a believer which he needed, by Allah, he will never taste the food of Paradise nor will he be able to taste the sealed drink of Paradise.”

records.chapter: Punishment of blaming a believing man or woman falsely
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Musa b. al-Mutawakil who said it was narrated to me by Abdillah b. Ja’far al-Himyari from Muhammad b. al-Hassan from al-Hassan b. Mahbub from Malik b. ’Atiyyah from Abi Ya’fur from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “One who blames a believing man or woman falsely, the Almighty Allah will count him among ‘Teenat-e-Khabaal’ on the Day of judgment.” The narrator asked the meaning of ‘Teenat-e- Khabaal’. Imam answered, “The dirty liquid coming out of the private parts of a fornicator woman.”
records.arabicText: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ مُوسَی بْنِ الْمُتَوَکِّلِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ الْحِمْیَرِیُّ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ مَالِکِ بْنِ عَطِیَّهَ عَنْ أَبِی یَعْفُورٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ بَهَتَ مُؤْمِناً أَوْ مُؤْمِنَهً مِمَّا لَیْسَ فِیهِمَا بَعَثَهُ اللَّهُ یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ فِی طِینَهِ خَبَالٍ حَتَّی یَخْرُجَ مِمَّا قَالَ قُلْتُ وَ مَا طِینَهُ خَبَالٍ قَالَ صَدِیدٌ یَخْرُجُ مِنْ فُرُوجِ الزُّنَاهِ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Musa b. al-Mutawakil who said it was narrated to me by Abdillah b. Ja’far al-Himyari from Muhammad b. al-Hassan from al-Hassan b. Mahbub from Malik b. ’Atiyyah from Abi Ya’fur from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: “One who blames a believing man or woman falsely, the Almighty Allah will count him among ‘Teenat-e-Khabaal’ on the Day of judgment.” The narrator asked the meaning of ‘Teenat-e- Khabaal’. Imam answered, “The dirty liquid coming out of the private parts of a fornicator woman.”

records.chapter: Punishment of blaming a believing man or woman falsely
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 2.  Imam  Muhammad  Baqir  (a.s.)  narrates  that  the  Holy Prophet (s.a.w.s.) said, “Abusing a believer, doing hypocrisy and killing him is disbelief. And eating his flesh (Backbiting) is disobedience of Allah.”
records.arabicText: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی الْحُسَیْنُ بْنُ أَبَانٍ عَنِ الْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ سَعِیدٍ عَنْ فَضَالَهَ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ بُکَیْرٍ عَنْ أَبِی بَصِیرٍ عَنْ أَبِی جَعْفَرٍ ع قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ص سِبَابُ الْمُؤْمِنِ فُسُوقٌ وَ قِتَالُهُ کُفْرٌ وَ أَکْلُ لَحْمِهِ مَعْصِیَهُ اللَّهِ.

records.chapter: Punishment of repeating the words of a believer in order to expose him
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Abi al-Qasim from Muhammad b. Ali al-Kufi from Muhammad b. Sinan from al-Muffadhal b. Umar from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “One who repeats the words of a believer with an intention to expose him, insult his personality or reduce his respect among the people, Allah will take away His guardianship and make Shaitaan as his guardian.”
records.arabicText: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ أَبِی الْقَاسِمِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِیٍّ الْکُوفِیِّ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ سِنَانٍ عَنِ الْمُفَضَّلِ بْنِ عُمَرَ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ رَوَی عَنْ مُؤْمِنٍ رِوَایَهً یُرِیدُ بِهَا شَیْنَهُ وَ هَدْمَ مُرُوءَتِهِ لِیَسْقُطَ مِنْ أَعْیُنِ النَّاسِ أَخْرَجَهُ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ مِنْ وَلَایَتِهِ إِلَی وَلَایَهِ الشَّیْطَانِ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Abi al-Qasim from Muhammad b. Ali al-Kufi from Muhammad b. Sinan from al-Muffadhal b. Umar from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: “One who repeats the words of a believer with an intention to expose him, insult his personality or reduce his respect among the people, Allah will take away His guardianship and make Shaitaan as his guardian.”

records.chapter: Punishment of not giving shelter to a helpless believer
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1.  Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.) said that one who has a house and if a believer desires to live in that house but the former does not allow him, the Almighty Allah says, “O My angels! This man is acting miserly in giving shelter to My servant in this  world. I swear  by My  honor, he  will never receive  a place in My Paradise.”
records.arabicText: أَبِی ره بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ قَالَ قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع مَنْ کَانَ لَهُ دَارٌ وَ احْتَاجَ مُؤْمِنٌ إِلَی أَنْ یَسْکُنَهَا فَمَنَعَهُ إِیَّاهَا قَالَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ مَلَائِکَتِی عَبْدِی بَخِلَ عَلَی عَبْدِی بِسُکْنَی الدُّنْیَا وَ عِزَّتِی لَا یَسْکُنُ جِنَانِی أَبَداً.

records.chapter: Punishment of exposing the defects of a believer
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. From the previous chain from Muhammad b. Sinan from Abi al-Jarud from Abi Burdah who said: “O those who have accepted faith apparently but the faith has not reached their hearts! Do not expose the defects of the believers. One who tries to find the faults of a believer, Allah brings out faults in him. If Allah brings out faults in a person, he will be disgraced even if he is inside the Holy Kaaba.”
records.arabicText: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ سِنَانٍ عَنْ أَبِی الْجَارُودِ عَنْ أَبِی بُرْدَهَ قَالَ: صَلَّی بِنَا رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ص ثُمَّ انْصَرَفَ مُسْرِعاً حَتَّی وَضَعَ یَدَهُ عَلَی بَابِ الْمَسْجِدِ ثُمَّ نَادَی بِأَعْلَی صَوْتِهِ یَا مَعْشَرَ النَّاسِ مَنْ آمَنَ بِلِسَانِهِ وَ لَمْ یُخْلِصْ إِلَی قَلْبِهِ لَا تَتَبَّعُوا عَوْرَاتِ الْمُؤْمِنِینَ فَإِنَّهُ مَنْ تَتَبَّعَ عَوْرَاتِ الْمُؤْمِنِینَ تَتَبَّعَ اللَّهُ عَوْرَتَهُ وَ مَنْ تَتَبَّعَ اللَّهُ عَوْرَتَهُ فَضَحَهُ وَ لَوْ فِی جَوْفِ بَیْتِهِ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. From the previous chain from Muhammad b. Sinan from Abi al-Jarud from Abi Burdah who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: “O those who have accepted faith apparently but the faith has not reached their hearts! Do not expose the defects of the believers. One who tries to find the faults of a believer, Allah brings out faults in him. If Allah brings out faults in a person, he will be disgraced even if he is inside the Holy Kaaba.”

records.chapter: Punishment of being haughty against Allah
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1.  Imam  Ja’far  Sadiq  (a.s.)  narrates  that  a  community  had committed   a   number   of   sins.   However   they   stopped committing them after a period and began to fear those sins a lot. Some people came forward and said, “Your sins are around our necks.” The Almighty Allah sent chastisement on them and said: “Those people used to fear Me and you tried to be haughty.”
records.arabicText: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْحُسَیْنِ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِی عُمَیْرٍ عَنْ حَفْصٍ الْبَخْتَرِیِّ قَالَ قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع إِنَّ قَوْماً أَذْنَبُوا ذُنُوباً کَثِیرَهً فَأَشْفَقُوا مِنْهَا وَ خَافُوا خَوْفاً شَدِیداً وَ جَاءَ آخَرُونَ فَقَالُوا ذُنُوبُکُمْ عَلَیْنَا فَأَنْزَلَ اللَّهُ عَلَیْهِمُ الْعَذَابَ ثُمَّ قَالَ تَبَارَکَ وَ تَعَالَی خَافُونِی وَ اجْتَرَأْتُمْ.

records.chapter: Punishment of intention of a sin
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan who said it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan al-Saffar from Ja’far b. Muhammad from Abdillah b. Bukayr b. Muhammad al-Azdi from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “Surely whenever a believer intends to commit a sin, he is deprived of his sustenance.”
records.arabicText: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ الصَّفَّارُ عَنْ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ بُکَیْرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ الْأَزْدِیِّ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: إِنَّ الْمُؤْمِنَ لَیَنْوِی الذَّنْبَ فَیُحْرَمُ رِزْقَهُ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan who said it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan al-Saffar from Ja’far b. Muhammad from Abdillah b. Bukayr b. Muhammad al-Azdi from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: “Surely whenever a believer intends to commit a sin, he is deprived of his sustenance.”

records.chapter: Punishment of committing sins
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Sa’d b. Abdillah from Ahmad b. Muhammad from al-Hassan b. Ali b. Fadhal from Abdillah b. Bukayr from some of his companions from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: I swear by My honor, I will never forgive you.”
records.arabicText: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِیِّ بْنِ فَضَّالٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ بُکَیْرٍ عَنْ بَعْضِ أَصْحَابِهِ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ هَمَّ بِالسَّیِّئَهِ فَلَا یَعْمَلْهَا فَلَا یُؤَاخِذُهُ الرَّبُّ فَإِنَّهُ رُبَّمَا عَمِلَ السَّیِّئَهَ فَیَرَاهُ الرَّبُّ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ فَیَقُولُ وَ عِزَّتِی وَ جَلَالِی لَا أَغْفِرُ لَهُ أَبَداً.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Sa’d b. Abdillah from Ahmad b. Muhammad from al-Hassan b. Ali b. Fadhal from Abdillah b. Bukayr from some of his companions from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: I swear by My honor, I will never forgive you.”

records.chapter: Punishment of including the pleasure of people with the pleasure of Allah while performing a good deed
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Abi al-Qasim from Muhammad b. Ali al-Kufi from al-Muffadhal b. Salih from Muhammad b. Ali al-Halabi from Zurarah and Hamran from Abi Ja’far (a.s.) who said: “If a servant performs a good deed for the sake of pleasure of Allah and for hereafter and if he includes the pleasure of people in it, he is a polytheist.”
records.arabicText: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ أَبِی الْقَاسِمِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِیٍّ الْکُوفِیِّ عَنِ الْمُفَضَّلِ بْنِ صَالِحٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِیٍّ الْحَلَبِیِّ عَنْ زُرَارَهَ وَ حُمْرَانَ عَنْ أَبِی جَعْفَرٍ ع قَالَ: لَوْ أَنَّ عَبْداً عَمِلَ عَمَلًا یَطْلُبُ بِهِ وَجْهَ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ وَ الدَّارَ الْآخِرَهَ فَأَدْخَلَ فِیهِ رِضَی أَحَدٍ مِنَ النَّاسِ کَانَ مُشْرِکاً.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Abi al-Qasim from Muhammad b. Ali al-Kufi from al-Muffadhal b. Salih from Muhammad b. Ali al-Halabi from Zurarah and Hamran from Abi Ja’far (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: “If a servant performs a good deed for the sake of pleasure of Allah and for hereafter and if he includes the pleasure of people in it, he is a polytheist.”

records.chapter: Punishment of including the pleasure of people with the pleasure of Allah while performing a good deed
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 2.  Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.) said, “One who performs a good deed for the sake of people, his outcome is along with those people  only.  Surely  every  showoff  is  polytheism.  The Almighty Allah says: One who performs a good deed for Me as well as for others he has done it for others and not for Me.”
records.arabicText: وَ قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع مَنْ عَمِلَ لِلنَّاسِ کَانَ ثَوَابُهُ عَلَی النَّاسِ إِنَّ کان [کُلَ] رِیَاءٍ شِرْکٌ. وَ قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَ مَنْ عَمِلَ لِی وَ لِغَیْرِی فَهُوَ لِمَنْ عَمِلَ لَهُ.
